title: You Know I'm No Good
why_this_song: You Know I'm No Good by Amy Winehouse (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I cheated myself"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I cheated myself"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Like I knew I would"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I told you I was trouble"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "You know that I'm no good"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

You know that I'm no good

Yeah, you know that I'm no good

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cheated" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "cheated" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "myself" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "myself" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Meet you downstairs in the bar and hurt
This is when my buzzer goes
Lick your lips as I soak my feet

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Your rolled up sleeves in your skull T-shirt
I cried for you on the kitchen floor
Then you notice little carpet burn

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "You Know I'm No Good" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "You Know I'm No Good" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "You Know I'm No Good" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "You Know I'm No Good" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "You Know I'm No Good" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "You Know I'm No Good"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
